#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire')

## HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions Class

Provides the Aspire hosting extension that wires a Hexalith\.EventStore \<b\>domain module\</b\> \(a domain
service such as the Counter sample or the Tenants service\) with its DAPR sidecar\. A domain module no longer
ships its own `*.AppHost`/`*.Aspire` project to hand\-roll this wiring — the EventStore AppHost
adds the module's project and calls [AddEventStoreDomainModule\(this IResourceBuilder&lt;ProjectResource&gt;, HexalithEventStoreResources, string, string, string, string, string\)](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.md#Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string) 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions\.AddEventStoreDomainModule\(this Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\<Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource\>, Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreResources, string, string, string, string, string\)'), which attaches a correctly
configured DAPR sidecar \(Epic A4\)\.

```csharp
public static class HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') → HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions

## HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions\.AddEventStoreDomainModule\(this IResourceBuilder\<ProjectResource\>, HexalithEventStoreResources, string, string, string, string, string\) Method

Attaches a DAPR sidecar to a domain\-module project so it can run on the Hexalith\.EventStore platform\.

```csharp
public static Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> AddEventStoreDomainModule(this Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder<Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource> domainModule, Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources eventStore, string appId, string? daprConfigPath=null, string? isolatedDaprResourcesPath=null, string? daprPlacementHostAddress=null, string? daprSchedulerHostAddress=null);
```

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).domainModule'></a>

`domainModule` [Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder&lt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.iresourcebuilder-1 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\`1')[Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.projectresource 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.ProjectResource')[&gt;](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/aspire.hosting.applicationmodel.iresourcebuilder-1 'Aspire\.Hosting\.ApplicationModel\.IResourceBuilder\`1')

The domain\-module project resource builder \(from `builder.AddProject<T>(name)`\)\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).eventStore'></a>

`eventStore` [HexalithEventStoreResources](Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Aspire\.HexalithEventStoreResources')

The EventStore topology resources returned by `AddHexalithEventStore`\.
Its state\-store and pub/sub components are referenced when the module is not isolated\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).appId'></a>

`appId` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The DAPR application id for the module's sidecar \(e\.g\. `"tenants"`, `"sample"`\)\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).daprConfigPath'></a>

`daprConfigPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional path to the module's DAPR access\-control \(Configuration CRD\) YAML governing inbound invocations
to this module\. `null` leaves the sidecar on the DAPR default configuration\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).isolatedDaprResourcesPath'></a>

`isolatedDaprResourcesPath` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional path to an empty/isolated DAPR resources directory\. When supplied, the sidecar loads \<b\>only\</b\>
that directory and the module gets \<b\>zero infrastructure access\</b\> — it does not reference the
EventStore state\-store or pub/sub components at all \(the strongest isolation, used by pure
service\-invocation domains like the Counter sample\)\. When `null`, the module references the shared
EventStore state\-store and pub/sub components \(used by domains that persist read models / subscribe to
events, like Tenants\)\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).daprPlacementHostAddress'></a>

`daprPlacementHostAddress` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional DAPR placement service address, formatted as `host` or `host:port`\.
Leave `null` to use the DAPR CLI default\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreDomainModuleExtensions.AddEventStoreDomainModule(thisAspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.IResourceBuilder_Aspire.Hosting.ApplicationModel.ProjectResource_,Hexalith.EventStore.Aspire.HexalithEventStoreResources,string,string,string,string,string).daprSchedulerHostAddress'></a>

`daprSchedulerHostAddress` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

Optional DAPR scheduler service address, formatted as `host` or `host:port`\.
Leave `null` to use the DAPR CLI default\.
